buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; media-src 'self' blob:; connect-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; worker-src 'self' blob:
